class.name: DSVReader
class.description: DSVReader reads CSV, TSV, PSV, and other single-character delimiter-separated files one row at a time. It uses the same parser options as [DSVImporter] without loading the full file into memory.

method.name: close
method.description: Closes the current file and resets the reader.

method.name: get_error
method.description: Returns the last error produced by [method open] or [method read_row].

method.name: get_length
method.description: Returns the current file length in bytes, or [code]0[/code] when no file is open.

method.name: get_line
method.description: Returns the current one-based input line number.

method.name: get_position
method.description: Returns the current file byte position, or [code]0[/code] when no file is open.

method.name: is_eof
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the file has been fully read and no parsed rows remain.

method.name: open
method.description: Opens [param file_path] for streaming reads. [param options] supports [code]trim_fields[/code], [code]skip_empty_rows[/code], [code]comment_prefixes[/code], [code]row_length_mode[/code], [code]null_values[/code], [code]true_values[/code], and [code]false_values[/code].

method.name: read_row
method.description: Reads and returns the next parsed row. Returns an empty [PackedStringArray] at EOF or after a parse error.

method.name: read_rows
method.description: Reads up to [param max_rows] rows. If [param max_rows] is [code]0[/code], reads until EOF.
